overall.description: Video game footage from Spider-Man showing two distinct scenes: first, a character in a grey suit stands on steps overlooking a university plaza at dusk; second, a character in a colorful pink and teal suit walks through the Harlem neighborhood, passing by a large mural and city pedestrians on wet streets before stopping at a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: university campus plaza with classical library building

events.description: scene fades to darkness as night falls and lighting shifts to low light

agents.ego_description: character stands on marble steps overlooking the plaza, turning slowly to survey the area and pedestrians below

notable_agents.action: man in black jacket gesturing with arms raised while standing on steps

entered.detail: large stone building with columns and grand steps at the top of the plaza
geometric red and grey brick pattern covering the plaza ground
white marble steps where the character stands overlooking the plaza
green leafy trees lining the edges of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character stands on white marble steps overlooking a university campus plaza at dusk. The plaza features a distinctive red brick geometric pattern and is populated with scattered pedestrians. A grand classical library building with stone columns dominates the background as the natural light fades toward night.

scene_state.functional_zone: Harlem pedestrian street with outdoor seating and large building mural

events.description: text 'Harlem' appears on screen identifying the neighborhood location

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the wet pedestrian street toward a large colorful mural on a building facade

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and conversing near outdoor benches

entered.detail: tall building with large colorful mural depicting a book and abstract face with vibrant colors
silver cylindrical metal bollards lining the edge of the walkway
wooden benches with round tables and closed red umbrellas
rain-soaked stone tiles reflecting the overcast sky and street lights

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wet pedestrian street in Harlem, where the character walks past metal bollards and outdoor seating areas. A massive colorful mural covers the facade of a building ahead, depicting abstract art and a book. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions on the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk along brick apartment building

events.description: character turns right corner moving from open plaza area to narrow sidewalk beside brick building
character transitions from walking to running along the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character walks and then runs along the narrow sidewalk, passing pedestrians and navigating around obstacles

entered.detail: red brick wall with dark windows and a green metal door
black garbage bags piled near a tree on the sidewalk edge
row of trees planted along the curb separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Turning the corner, the character moves from the open plaza into a narrower sidewalk confined by a red brick building wall on the right. The path is lined with street trees and trash bags. The character accelerates from walking to running while navigating past opposing pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character stops at crosswalk waiting for traffic signal to change

agents.ego_description: character stops at the crosswalk and stands waiting alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black car driving down the street approaching the intersection

entered.detail: yellow traffic signal housing showing red hand indicating stop
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
one-way street sign mounted below the traffic light

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a city street intersection and stops at the crosswalk to wait for the traffic signal. The traffic light displays a red hand indicating pedestrians should wait. Other pedestrians gather at the curb while a black car approaches in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze across a university campus as the fading light of dusk settles over the architecture. It begins with a character standing atop white marble steps, overlooking a wide plaza defined by a red brick geometric pattern. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses scattered pedestrians moving through the open space. The scene then expands to reveal a grand classical library with towering stone columns, which dominates the background as the natural light gradually shifts toward night.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the rain-soaked streets of Harlem, transitioning from a wide, artistic plaza into a confined urban corridor before ending at a busy intersection. It begins on a wet pedestrian street where the character walks past metal bollards and outdoor seating toward a massive, colorful mural depicting abstract art and a book. As the character turns the corner, the open space shifts into a narrower sidewalk bordered by a red brick wall, street trees, and trash bags. The pace then accelerates from a walk to a run while navigating through opposing pedestrians, before finally slowing to a halt at a city crosswalk. The scene concludes as the character waits beside other pedestrians under a red traffic signal while a black car approaches in the distance.
